title: Arai Raider X

specs.material: Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) with Arai's proprietary EPS liner and Carbon Fiber reinforced shell

technical_analysis: The Arai Raider X utilizes a revolutionary multi-density EPS liner architecture designed to dissipate kinetic energy across varying impact vectors. By integrating the MIPS low-friction layer directly into the shell structure rather than as an add-on, the helmet achieves superior rotational impact mitigation without compromising structural rigidity. The carbon-fiber reinforced outer shell features a unique ribbed geometry that enhances torsional stiffness while maintaining a lightweight profile essential for high-performance riding.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of safety and style with the Arai Raider X, a full-face helmet engineered for those who demand uncompromising protection without sacrificing aerodynamic efficiency. Its sleek, aggressive design cuts through the wind, reducing drag and noise levels to allow you to focus on the road ahead. Whether navigating city streets or carving through mountain passes, the Raider X offers a perfect blend of modern aesthetics and proven Arai reliability.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Raider X full-face helmet featuring MIPS technology, ECE 22.06 certification, and premium carbon fiber construction for ultimate safety and style.
